---
title: 'Worldly Logic'
date: '2013-04-20T04:07:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Call To Excellence'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '2407650890093976479'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/worldly-logic.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Call To Excellence/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://3.bp.blogspot.com/-c9e6tQiGQmg/UXIUY9niZyI/AAAAAAAANHY/AJvuJJfTcHk/s1600/black+backpacks+libral+logic.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="548" src="http://3.bp.blogspot.com/-c9e6tQiGQmg/UXIUY9niZyI/AAAAAAAANHY/AJvuJJfTcHk/s640/black+backpacks+libral+logic.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
